name: aegis
description: Run every tool call through Aegis ATV's 16-step firewall + cryptographic audit chain. BLOCKs destructive operations, requires approval for grey-zone calls, and writes a SHA3-chained Ed25519-signed audit line per decision.

aegisUrl.description: Base URL of the Aegis sidecar service. Run `docker compose up -d` from the Aegis-ATV repo to start it.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID stamped into every audit record. Use distinct tenants for multi-channel ops (per channel, per team, etc.).

timeoutMs.description: Aegis evaluation timeout in milliseconds. Independently controls when the AbortController fires; the post-timeout policy is set by `failClosed` (fail-open by default, fail-closed if `failClosed: true`).

failClosed.description: Sidecar-error policy. When `false` (default), timeouts / 5xx / unreachable errors return ALLOW (fail-open) and emit a stderr warning. When `true`, the same errors return BLOCK with `blockReason` set to the underlying error — recommended for regulated industries where silent fail-open is not acceptable.
